title: How to include a list of issues in a doc

posts.author: robopzet (Rob Schlüter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to add a list of items in a doc with issues on a board. I know you can embed a board, but:
a. that includes the complete spreadsheet of the board (like it’s an old-fashined HTML iframe).
b. it creates a scrollbar if the items do not fit.
c. viewers can edit the items.
d. the layout margins differ from the rest of the document.

A second options is to create a list with links. That looks OK, but data does not stay in sync with the board. Another problem is that links are rendered as absolute URLs, not the item titles.

Is there another option to get the items a as list of links I missed?
